title: senecio subcoriaceus
intro: Senecio subcoriaceus, also known as the rough-leaved groundsel, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Senecio subcoriaceus include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and soothe digestive problems. Traditional herbal preparations of Senecio subcoriaceus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
